entity.summary: Komodo ecosystem decentralized exchange technology released as the first GUI for atomic-swap trading in November 2017. BarterDEX later became Komodo's previous-generation DEX and was officially retired as Komodo shifted development focus to AtomicDEX, its third-generation decentralized exchange technology.
entity.notes: HEI uses rebranded / rebrand because Komodo materials describe BarterDEX as the previous DEX and AtomicDEX as the third-generation successor, with BarterDEX officially retired and Komodo focusing development on AtomicDEX. AtomicDEX is not linked by successor_id because it is not yet a canonical HEI entity.

evidence.title: Komodo AtomicDEX public beta announcement
evidence.notes: First-party history states that BarterDEX was officially retired and replaced in Komodo's development focus by AtomicDEX.
